hero.headline: Cut Your Ahmedabad Electricity Bills by Up to 90% with Gujarat Solar Power
hero.subheadline: Premium solar systems with government subsidy support. Expert installation serving Ahmedabad, Satellite, and surrounding areas.

trust_signals.headline: 100+ Systems Installed
trust_signals.description: Proven track record of powering homes and businesses across Gujarat.

trust_signals.headline: 5+ Years Experience
trust_signals.description: Deep technical expertise in MNRE guidelines and local net-metering processes.

trust_signals.headline: Local Service Team
trust_signals.description: Based in Ahmedabad for lightning-fast maintenance and on-site support.

services_section.headline: Tailored Solar Solutions
services_section.image_alt: Solar EPC service array inspection in Ahmedabad

services.title: Home Solar
services.description: Maximize your roof space with high-efficiency residential systems designed for Ahmedabad properties.

services.title: Commercial Solar
services.description: Reduce operational costs for offices, warehouses, and shopping complexes across Gujarat.

services.title: School/Clinic Solar
services.description: Reliable uninterrupted power for essential community services with zero noise and pollution.

services.title: Annual Maintenance
services.description: Regular cleaning, shading reports, and technical diagnostics to ensure peak annual generation.

faq.question: How much subsidy can I get?
faq.answer: Under the PM-Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana, residential consumers in Ahmedabad can get up to ₹78,000 subsidy for a 3kW system. Our team handles 100% of the net-metering and subsidy applications.

faq.question: What is the cost of installation?
faq.answer: Costs vary based on system size and panel quality. Typically, a 3kW system starts from ₹1.5 Lakhs (before subsidy) in Chhattisgarh. We offer easy zero-cost EMI options.

faq.question: Do solar panels work in rainy season?
faq.answer: Yes! Panels generate power from solar light, not heat. While generation is lower on heavy cloudy days, modern Tier-1 monocrystalline panels generate substantial power in the monsoon seasons of Gujarat.
